title: Dream's Compass
description: This datapack or mod allows you to enjoy the game of speedrunner vs hunters
body: ## Dream's Compass This datapack or mod allows you to enjoy the game of speedrunner vs hunters. ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddbc00f822b1e1a05603c847b9f22e7796da52a5.png) ## How to use In order to start the game, the speedrunner needs to write the command below and then all compasses created in the game will point to the speedrunner. ```/trigger compass:dream``` - (Mod v1.5+, Datapack v1.3+) ```/trigger bizcub.dream``` - (Mod v1.4+, Datapack v1.2+) ```/function compass:dream``` - (Mod v1.0+, Datapack v1.0+) --- If you want to start the game with compasses right away, you can use this command and then all hunters will be given compasses. ```/trigger compass.compasses``` - (Mod v1.5+, Datapack v1.3+) --- ![preview](https://i.postimg.cc/664sntJf/on-1.gif) The compass by default points to the speedrunner, even if he has moved to another dimension. This is done in order to hide from hunters where the speedrunner is. In order for hunters to understand that the speedrunner has moved, you need to use a special command. After that, if the speedrunner ends up in another dimension, the compass will begin to rotate in different directions. ```/trigger compass.update_dimension_on``` - (Mod v1.5+, Datapack v1.3+) ```/trigger bizcub.cheat1``` - (Mod v1.4+, Datapack v1.2+) ```/function compass:cheat1``` - (Mod v1.0+, Datapack v1.0+) --- ![preview](https://i.postimg.cc/1RrGWNQm/on-1.gif) To disable this feature you need to use this command. ```/trigger compass.update_dimension_off``` - (Mod v1.5+, Datapack v1.3+) ```/trigger bizcub.nocheat1``` - (Mod v1.4+, Datapack v1.2+) ```/function compass:nocheat1``` - (Mod v1.0+, Datapack v1.0+) ## Dependencies - Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
